queries.question: Display all the 2-hour-long movies that are action or romantic comedies.
queries.sql:
SELECT Movies.title 
FROM Genres JOIN Movies ON Genres.id = Movies.genre_id JOIN MovieDurations ON Movies.id = MovieDurations.movie_id JOIN Durations ON MovieDurations.duration_id = Durations.id
WHERE (Genres.name = "Action Movie" OR Genres.name = "Romantic Comedy") AND Durations.minutes = 120
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?genres a :Genres .
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?moviedurations a :MovieDurations .
  ?moviedurations p:hasMovies ?movies .
  ?durations a :Durations .
  ?moviedurations p:hasDurations ?durations .
  ?movies p:title ?title .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?durations p:minutes ?minutes_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?name_w) = "Action Movie" || STR(?name_w2) = "Romantic Comedy")) && (STR(?minutes_w) = "120" || STR(?minutes_w) = "120.0")))
}

queries.question: Show all the action movies and show just the 2-hour-long romantic comedies.
queries.sql:
SELECT Movies.title 
FROM Genres JOIN Movies ON Genres.id = Movies.genre_id JOIN MovieDurations ON Movies.id = MovieDurations.movie_id JOIN Durations ON MovieDurations.duration_id = Durations.id
WHERE Genres.name = "Action Movie" OR Genres.name = "Romantic Comedy" AND Durations.minutes = 120
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?genres a :Genres .
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?moviedurations a :MovieDurations .
  ?moviedurations p:hasMovies ?movies .
  ?durations a :Durations .
  ?moviedurations p:hasDurations ?durations .
  ?movies p:title ?title .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?durations p:minutes ?minutes_w .
  FILTER((STR(?name_w) = "Action Movie" || (STR(?name_w2) = "Romantic Comedy" && (STR(?minutes_w) = "120" || STR(?minutes_w) = "120.0"))))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display all 2-hour-long romantic comedies and action movies.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?genres a :Genres .
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?moviedurations a :MovieDurations .
  ?moviedurations p:hasMovies ?movies .
  ?durations a :Durations .
  ?moviedurations p:hasDurations ?durations .
  ?movies p:title ?title .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?durations p:minutes ?minutes_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?name_w) = "Action Movie" || STR(?name_w2) = "Romantic Comedy")) && (STR(?minutes_w) = "120" || STR(?minutes_w) = "120.0")))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?genres a :Genres .
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?moviedurations a :MovieDurations .
  ?moviedurations p:hasMovies ?movies .
  ?durations a :Durations .
  ?moviedurations p:hasDurations ?durations .
  ?movies p:title ?title .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?durations p:minutes ?minutes_w .
  FILTER((STR(?name_w) = "Action Movie" || (STR(?name_w2) = "Romantic Comedy" && (STR(?minutes_w) = "120" || STR(?minutes_w) = "120.0"))))
} }
}
